title: OPHub
description: You can expect many features that help you manage things on OPSUCHT.net! From shard trackers to lootboxes and rewards, everything is included.
body:
# ✨ **OPHub**

**OPHub** is an all‑in‑one **client‑side utility mod** for **economy tracking**, **market signs**, **HUD customization**, and **QoL tools**. Built to be **faster**, **cleaner**, and **smarter**.

---

## 🧭 **What it does**
- 📊 **Custom HUD** with toggleable lines  
  - **OPShards**  
  - **Goal**  
  - **Buy / Sell totals**  
  - **Job payout average**  
  - **Last payout**  
  - **Best payout**  
- 🧾 **Job payout tracker**  
  - Adjustable analysis window (e.g. last 4 payouts)  
  - Full payout history saved in config  
  - Best payout detection  
  - One‑click payout reset  
- 🪧 **Market sign helper**  
  - Auto resolves **BM/SM** sign prices  
  - Uses your configured market percentage  
  - Clean output: `B <price>` / `S <price>`

---

## ✅ **How it works (Market Signs)**
1. **Line 1**: your Minecraft name  
2. **Line 2**: item amount  
3. **Line 3**: **BM** or **SM**  
4. **Line 4**: exact item name  

---

## ⚙️ **Organized settings hub**
- Categories: **Commands**, **HUD**, **Overlay**, **Hotbar**, **Head**, **Market**, **Jobs**, **Tools**  
- Presets, +/- controls, persistent settings

---

## 🛠️ **Extra utilities**
- **Command Buttons**  
- **Overlay settings** (color, radius, blocks)  
- **Hotbar durability overlay** (toggle, move, resize)  
- **Head Transformer tools**  
- **Shard calculator**  
- **Cosmetic utility screens**  
- 🎁 **Cosmetic Box every hour**  
- 💎 **Buy cosmetics with the box**

---

## 🚀 **Why OPHub**
- Faster economy workflow  
- Better real‑time overview  
- Cleaner sign setup  
- All‑in‑one control center  

---

## 🌐 **Links**
- **Gallery**: https://modrinth.com/mod/ophub/gallery
- **Discord**: https://discord.gg/RdhTVM23s7
